text: I find myself at the threshold of a modern, thoughtfully designed exhibit, with transparent barriers separating me from a vibrant, intellectual space focused on research and development. The angle tilts my perspective, making me aware of my presence as an observer and participant in this environment. The words and visuals invite me to ponder the relationship between humans and intelligent machines. I feel curious and contemplative, as though each step deeper into the exhibition will unveil new ideas and possibilities.
